ELPAC Level 2
Lexile BR–300L
DTR · TALK ABOUT A SCENE

Green String Testimony

STS-MS7-L2-BR300-MSSCI7-CFB-NAV-01 • MS Science Grade 7 • Cycling of Matter and Flow of Energy in Ecosystems
Look at the picture. You will answer some questions about it. Press the play button to hear each question. Record your answer for each question. You can listen to your answer and record it again. Click SUBMIT RECORDINGS when you have answered all the questions.
JUST FOR FUN · OPTIONAL
On nature shows, the camera pulls one animal aside to tell its own side of the story. In this class each student takes a turn speaking as one living thing from a North Woods forest and confessing what it eats and what eats it. Josie has her turn now, and the green arrows on the board keep score, because every arrow shows energy moving from one living thing to the next.
If the fox disappeared from this forest, which arrow would break first, and what would happen to the rabbits?
Optional. You do not have to record this one.
1
What is Wyatt doing?
Look at the picture. Say: Wyatt is ____ on his clipboard. (writing / sleeping)
2
What is Josie holding?
Look at the picture. Say: Josie is holding a big ____. (sign / pillow)
3
What is the teacher doing?
Look at the picture. Say: The teacher is holding up a ____. (photo / shoe)
4
What place is this? How do you know?
Look at the picture. Say: This is a ____ room. (science / music)
5
Tell me about the food web board.
Look at the picture. Say: The board has many ____. (pictures / windows)
6
What is Harper wearing?
Look at the picture. Say: Harper is wearing a ____ coat. (yellow / purple)
Record an answer for each question, then submit.
Content alignment: NGSS MS-LS2-3 — Cycling of Matter and Flow of Energy in Ecosystems. ELD (Speaking — official ELPAC “Talk About a Scene”): PI.A.1, PII.B.3, PII.B.4, PII.B.5.
